# JWC Property Group - Summary

**Website:** https://www.jwc.com.au  
**Date Summarized:** March 13, 2026  
**Location:** South Yarra, Victoria, Australia

## Overview

JWC Property Group is a premier real estate agency based in South Yarra, Victoria. They specialize in residential real estate services with a focus on delivering exceptional results to clients throughout South Yarra and surrounding areas.

## Services Offered

### 1. Property Appraisal
- Accurate property valuation
- Expert insight on property value
- Professional assessment services

### 2. Property Management
- Comprehensive rental property management
- Services for both rental providers and renters
- Property maintenance coordination

### 3. Project Sales
- Off-the-plan property opportunities
- Industry connections for new developments
- Investment property sales

### 4. Rentals
- Property rental services
- Tenant management
- Rental property listings
